The record

Our accomplishments

Training is measured in results — scholarships won, examinations passed, stages filled. Here is ours.

20+ Years of teaching
175+ Students trained
3 CCRT scholars
4 Branches

Scholars

3

CCRT Scholarship Awardees

Three Fankaar students have been awarded the CCRT (Centre for Cultural Resources and Training) scholarship — a national honour from the Ministry of Culture, Government of India, given to young artists of exceptional promise. ‹ADD scholar names & years›

Examination results

Board Examination Results

Fankaar students appear annually for examinations through Bhatkhande Sanskriti Vishwavidyalaya (Lucknow), Gandharva Mahavidyalaya and Rajasthan Sangeet Sansthan. ‹PLACEHOLDER — add notable results: distinctions, toppers, year-wise pass highlights›

Press & recognition

Awards & Press Features

‹PLACEHOLDER — add award names, festival invitations and press coverage with links. Each can also be its own entry (category: Award or Press) so it appears in the right group.›

Milestones

175+

Students Trained Across Jaipur & Online

Since its founding, Fankaar has trained more than 175 students — from six-year-olds taking their first steps to adults past seventy returning to a lifelong dream — across four Jaipur branches and our online classroom.

Add your name to the record

The next scholar, the next topper, the next name on this page could be yours.

Fankaar

Preserving Heritage, Nurturing Artistry.
